column8: _____ of these machines is suitable for the work you want to do. You can use them.
column9: That evening my mother spoke with such a quiet anger that Aunt Milly was intimidated. After that _____ of them was ever willing to take up the subject.
column10: The first time we met after the ball, _____ of us said a word that was not trivial.
column11: The news did not shock _____ of them.
column12: There is a train at 11.30 and one at 12.05. _____ train will get you to Oxford in time for the meeting.
column13: I have got 2 brothers. _____ brother has been abroad yet.
column14: My wife and I watched him make the parcel but he took no notice of _____ of us.
column15: The houses on _____ side were tall and big.
column16: I have travelled by both trains and _____ train had a restaurant car.
column17: There was a lamp at _____ end of the street.
